commands.review_summary:
The PR changes memory-core shadow database cleanup to keep iterating after sidecar delete failures, rethrow the first post-reindex cleanup error, and route aged orphan cleanup through that helper with tests.

PR surface: Source +8, Tests +26. Total +34 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main swallows aged cleanup deletion errors, while PR head throws them and `runInPlaceReindex` calls that path before reindex work starts.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Current head needs contributor or maintainer follow-up because it has a blocking runtime regression and the real behavior proof no longer covers all changed behavior.

target.title: fix(memory): keep cleaning reindex sidecars after lock errors
